_comment: Example KubernetesJob template payload.  Consumed by the example-template generator and the docs/--show-example surface.  The Job is constructed programmatically by orb.providers.kubernetes.utilities.job_spec.build_job_spec; this JSON only captures the per-template ORB-level fields.
